# Vježba 11 — Impuls 1

## Fizikalni uvod: Zakon količine gibanja

Zakon očuvanja količine gibanja (impulsa) jedan je od tri temeljna zakona mehanike fluida. On proizlazi iz **Newtonovog drugog zakona** primijenjenog na strujanje fluida kroz odabrani **kontrolni volumen**.

Sila kojom fluid djeluje na prepreku (lopaticu, koljeno cijevi ili mlaznicu) uzrokovana je promjenom količine gibanja struje fluida. Prema principu akcije i reakcije, sila kojom čvrste stijenke djeluju na fluid jednaka je, ali suprotnog smjera od sile kojom fluid djeluje na te stijenke:
$$\vec{F} = \dot{m} (\vec{v}_{iz} - \vec{v}_{ul})$$

Kod mlaza koji udara u pregradu, ukupna sila izravno ovisi o **promjeni vektora brzine**:
1.  **Ravna ploča:** Mlaz se skreće za 90°, što znači da se gubi komponenta brzine u smjeru upada. Sila je $F = \dot{m} v$.
2.  **Polukružna lopatica:** Mlaz se skreće za punih 180°, vraćajući se natrag. Promjena brzine je dvostruka ($v - (-v) = 2v$), pa je i sila dvostruko veća: $F = 2 \dot{m} v$. 

Ovaj fenomen je temelj rada hidrauličkih strojeva – upravo zato lopatice Peltonovih turbina imaju specifičan, zakrivljen "žličasti" oblik kako bi se maksimizirala sila potiska. Zakon količine gibanja također objašnjava pojavu **reakcijskih sila** u koljenima cjevovoda pod tlakom, što u inženjerskoj praksi zahtijeva postavljanje čvrstih sidrenih blokova kako bi se spriječilo pomicanje cijevi i pucanje spojeva.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- NOVI WIDGET: Sila mlaza (Ravna vs Zakrivljena ploha) -->
<div id="widget-jet-impact">
    <style>
        #widget-jet-impact * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-shell {
            max-width: 1020px;
            margin: 24px auto;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid rgba(86, 115, 138, 0.16);
            border-radius: 30px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.14), transparent 28%), linear-gradient(180deg, #fcfeff 0%, #f3f8fd 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 28px 68px rgba(33, 55, 77, 0.14);
            font-family: "Aptos", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 0.85rem;
            align-items: start;
            padding: 1.35rem 1.45rem 1rem;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.16), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(135deg, #eef8ff 0%, #ffffff 52%, #fff6eb 100%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(86, 115, 138, 0.12);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-kicker {
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #6f869a;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 2vw, 1.55rem);
            line-height: 1.12;
            color: #193f63;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-sub {
            margin: 0.48rem 0 0;
            max-width: 68ch;
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            line-height: 1.56;
            color: #547088;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 0.66rem 0.88rem;
            border: 1px solid #d7e7f5;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, #f7fbff);
            color: #1f4f79;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            line-height: 1.35;
            max-width: min(100%, 320px);
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: right;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-note {
            margin: 0.85rem 1.45rem 0;
            padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
            border: 1px solid #d8e8f6;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #edf8ff, #fff7ee);
            color: #325775;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            line-height: 1.56;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stage {
            margin: 0.85rem 1.45rem 0;
            padding: 0.85rem;
            border: 1px solid #dbe7f2;
            border-radius: 26px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f7fbff 0%, #edf5fb 100%);
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stage-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 0.55rem;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stage-text strong {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            color: #143f66;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stage-text span {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.79rem;
            line-height: 1.48;
            color: #547088;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stage-pills {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 0.45rem;
            justify-content: flex-start;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pill {
            padding: 0.4rem 0.62rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            border: 1px solid #cfe0ef;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
            color: #335876;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pill-warm {
            border-color: #fed7aa;
            background: rgba(255, 247, 237, 0.92);
            color: #9a3412;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-canvases {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 0.85rem;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pane {
            border: 1px solid #d8e7f3;
            border-radius: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            padding: 0.9rem 1rem 1rem;
            box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pane-head {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pane h4 {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #36506b;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pane-badge {
            padding: 0.32rem 0.55rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            border: 1px solid #d7e6f6;
            color: #1d4f7a;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pane-copy {
            margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            line-height: 1.5;
            color: #547088;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-pane canvas {
            display: block;
            width: min(100%, 620px);
            height: auto;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #e1eaf3;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fcfeff 0%, #eef4fb 100%);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forceband {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 0.65rem;
            padding: 0.85rem 1.45rem 0;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forcecard {
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 0.82rem 0.9rem;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(29, 79, 120, 0.12);
            background: linear-gradient(160deg, #ffffff 0%, #f3f8fd 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forcecard-warm {
            border-color: rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.24);
            background: linear-gradient(160deg, #fff7ed 0%, #fff1f2 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.12);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forcecard-dark {
            border-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
            background: linear-gradient(160deg, #143a63 0%, #1d4f7a 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 18px 32px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.18);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-force-eyebrow {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.28rem;
            font-size: 0.66rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #688298;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forcecard strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 1.7vw, 1.45rem);
            line-height: 1;
            color: #0f3558;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forcecard-dark .ji-force-eyebrow,
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forcecard-dark strong,
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-forcecard-dark .ji-force-hint {
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-force-hint {
            display: block;
            margin-top: 0.32rem;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: #547088;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 0.65rem;
            padding: 0.7rem 1.45rem 0;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stat {
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 0.78rem 0.85rem;
            border: 1px solid rgba(29, 79, 120, 0.09);
            border-radius: 16px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f1f7fb 100%);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stat small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.28rem;
            font-size: 0.64rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.07em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #6b8497;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-stat strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: #11375a;
            font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
            overflow-wrap: anywhere;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 0.8rem;
            padding: 0.85rem 1.45rem 1.45rem;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-card {
            border: 1px solid #e3ebf2;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: #ffffff;
            padding: 0.9rem 0.95rem;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-section {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #678195;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-controls {
            display: grid;
            gap: 0.85rem;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-row label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #36506b;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-row input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2b7ab8;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-compare {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            line-height: 1.54;
            color: #355771;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-compare div + div {
            margin-top: 0.5rem;
        }
        #widget-jet-impact .ji-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            border-color: #c9dcf0;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff7ff, #fff5e8);
            color: #1d4970;
            font-size: 0.81rem;
            line-height: 1.54;
        }
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
            #widget-jet-impact .ji-head,
            #widget-jet-impact .ji-lower {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #widget-jet-impact .ji-forceband {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            }
            #widget-jet-impact .ji-chip {
                justify-self: start;
                text-align: left;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 620px) {
            #widget-jet-impact .ji-forceband,
            #widget-jet-impact .ji-summary {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #widget-jet-impact .ji-pane-head {
                align-items: flex-start;
                flex-direction: column;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="ji-shell">
        <div class="ji-head">
            <div>
                <div class="ji-kicker">Impuls mlaza na lopatice</div>
                <h3 class="ji-title">Isti mlaz daje veću silu tek onda kada mu promijeniš i smjer, ne samo kada ga zaustaviš</h3>
                <p class="ji-sub">Gornja scena namjerno uspoređuje dva kontrolna volumena u istom kadru. Ravna ploča poništava izlaznu x-komponentu, dok zakrivljena lopatica vraća mlaz natrag pa promjena količine gibanja postaje dvostruko veća i sila odmah raste.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="ji-chip">F = ṁ(v<sub>iz,x</sub> - v<sub>ul,x</sub>)</div>
        </div>

        <div class="ji-note"><strong>Kako čitati usporedbu:</strong> prvo pogledaj ulaznu x-brzinu koja je ista u oba slučaja. Zatim usporedi što ostaje na izlazu: kod ravne ploče izlazna x-komponenta pada na nulu, a kod zakrivljene lopatice postaje negativna. Upravo ta promjena predznaka objašnjava zašto se sila na zakrivljenoj lopatici udvostručuje.</div>

        <div class="ji-stage">
            <div class="ji-stage-head">
                <div class="ji-stage-text">
                    <strong>Isti ulazni mlaz, dva različita izlaza</strong>
                    <span>Usporedbu čitaj s lijeva na desno: ulazni impuls <strong>ṁv<sub>x</sub></strong> je isti u oba slučaja, a razlika u sili pojavljuje se tek kada se promijeni izlazna x-komponenta brzine.</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ji-stage-pills">
                    <span class="ji-pill">isti ulaz: ṁv</span>
                    <span class="ji-pill ji-pill-warm">veći Δv<sub>x</sub> -&gt; veća reakcija</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ji-canvases">
                <div class="ji-pane">
                    <div class="ji-pane-head">
                        <h4>Ravna ploča</h4>
                        <span class="ji-pane-badge">v<sub>iz,x</sub> = 0</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="ji-pane-copy">Mlaz izgubi x-komponentu pa ploča prima jedan ulazni impuls po sekundi.</p>
                    <canvas id="canvas-flat" width="400" height="280"></canvas>
                </div>
                <div class="ji-pane">
                    <div class="ji-pane-head">
                        <h4>Zakrivljena lopatica</h4>
                        <span class="ji-pane-badge">v<sub>iz,x</sub> &lt; 0</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="ji-pane-copy">Lopatica vraća mlaz natrag pa promjena x-impulsa postaje približno dvostruka.</p>
                    <canvas id="canvas-cup" width="400" height="280"></canvas>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ji-forceband">
            <div class="ji-forcecard">
                <small class="ji-force-eyebrow">Ravna ploča</small>
                <strong><span id="f-flat-out">0</span> N</strong>
                <span class="ji-force-hint">Reakcija ostaje na razini jednog ulaznog impulsa: <strong>F = ṁv</strong>.</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ji-forcecard ji-forcecard-warm">
                <small class="ji-force-eyebrow">Zakrivljena lopatica</small>
                <strong><span id="f-cup-out">0</span> N</strong>
                <span class="ji-force-hint">Povrat mlaza pojača promjenu količine gibanja: <strong>F = 2ṁv</strong>.</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ji-forcecard ji-forcecard-dark">
                <small class="ji-force-eyebrow">Pojačanje zbog skretanja</small>
                <strong id="ji-force-ratio">2.0×</strong>
                <span class="ji-force-hint">Omjer zakrivljene i ravne reakcije za isti ulazni mlaz.</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ji-summary">
            <div class="ji-stat"><small>Ravna: v_ul,x</small><strong id="jet-flat-vin">0.00 m/s</strong></div>
            <div class="ji-stat"><small>Ravna: v_iz,x</small><strong id="jet-flat-vout">0.00 m/s</strong></div>
            <div class="ji-stat"><small>Zakrivljena: v_iz,x</small><strong id="jet-cup-vout">0.00 m/s</strong></div>
            <div class="ji-stat"><small>Δ(ṁv_x)</small><strong id="jet-dmom-out">0.00 N</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class="ji-lower">
            <div class="ji-card ji-controls">
                <strong class="ji-section">Ulazni uvjeti</strong>
                <div class="ji-row">
                    <label for="v-slider-jet"><span>Brzina mlaza v</span><strong><span id="v-val-jet">15</span> m/s</strong></label>
                    <input type="range" id="v-slider-jet" min="5" max="30" value="15" step="1">
                </div>
                <div class="ji-row">
                    <label for="m-slider-jet"><span>Maseni protok ṁ</span><strong><span id="m-val-jet">5.0</span> kg/s</strong></label>
                    <input type="range" id="m-slider-jet" min="1" max="10" value="5" step="0.5">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ji-card ji-compare">
                <strong class="ji-section">Što se mijenja između plohe i lopatice</strong>
                <div>Za <strong>ravnu ploču</strong> vrijedi približno <strong>v<sub>iz,x</sub> = 0</strong>, pa je reakcija jednaka ulaznom impulsu po sekundi: <strong>F = ṁv</strong>.</div>
                <div>Za <strong>zakrivljenu lopaticu</strong> mlaz izlazi natrag, pa je <strong>v<sub>iz,x</sub> ≈ -v</strong>. Tada je promjena x-impulsa približno dvostruka i dobivaš <strong>F = 2ṁv</strong>.</div>
            </div>

            <div class="ji-card ji-explainer">
                <strong class="ji-section">Tumačenje scene</strong>
                <div id="jet-impact-explainer"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cFlat = document.getElementById('canvas-flat');
        const cCup = document.getElementById('canvas-cup');
        const ctxF = cFlat.getContext('2d');
        const ctxC = cCup.getContext('2d');
        
        const vSl = document.getElementById('v-slider-jet');
        const mSl = document.getElementById('m-slider-jet');

        function update() {
            const v = parseFloat(vSl.value);
            const m = parseFloat(mSl.value);
            
            const fFlat = m * v;
            const fCup = 2 * m * v;

            document.getElementById('v-val-jet').textContent = v;
            document.getElementById('m-val-jet').textContent = m.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('f-flat-out').textContent = Math.round(fFlat);
            document.getElementById('f-cup-out').textContent = Math.round(fCup);
            document.getElementById('jet-flat-vin').textContent = v.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
            document.getElementById('jet-flat-vout').textContent = '0.00 m/s';
            document.getElementById('jet-cup-vout').textContent = (-v).toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
            document.getElementById('jet-dmom-out').textContent = (m * (0 - v)).toFixed(1) + ' N';
            document.getElementById('ji-force-ratio').textContent = (fFlat > 0 ? (fCup / fFlat).toFixed(1) : '0.0') + '×';
            document.getElementById('jet-impact-explainer').textContent = `Za brzinu ${v.toFixed(1)} m/s i maseni protok ${m.toFixed(1)} kg/s ravna ploča mijenja x-komponentu brzine s ${v.toFixed(1)} na 0 m/s, pa je sila ${fFlat.toFixed(1)} N. Zakrivljena lopatica vraća mlaz na ${(-v).toFixed(1)} m/s u x-smjeru, pa je promjena impulsa dvostruko veća i sila raste na ${fCup.toFixed(1)} N.`;

            drawFlat(v, m);
            drawCup(v, m);
        }

        function drawBackdrop(ctx) {
            const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 280);
            bg.addColorStop(0, '#fbfdff');
            bg.addColorStop(1, '#edf4fb');
            ctx.fillStyle = bg;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 400, 280);

            const panel = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 28, 0, 244);
            panel.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255,255,255,0.94)');
            panel.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(239,246,255,0.86)');
            ctx.fillStyle = panel;
            ctx.fillRect(18, 28, 364, 214);

            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.38)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
            ctx.setLineDash([6, 7]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(24, 150);
            ctx.lineTo(376, 150);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
        }

        function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - 11 * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - 11 * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - 11 * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - 11 * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.fill();

            ctx.font = 'bold 11px Aptos';
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.fillText(label, x1 + 4, y1 - 10);
        }

        function drawJetBeam(ctx, startX, centerY, length, spread, colorStart, colorEnd, phase) {
            const beam = ctx.createLinearGradient(startX, centerY, startX + length, centerY);
            beam.addColorStop(0, colorStart);
            beam.addColorStop(1, colorEnd);
            ctx.fillStyle = beam;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(startX, centerY - spread * 0.55);
            ctx.lineTo(startX + length, centerY - spread);
            ctx.lineTo(startX + length, centerY + spread);
            ctx.lineTo(startX, centerY + spread * 0.55);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            for (let i = 0; i < 18; i++) {
                const t = i / 17;
                const px = startX + 12 + t * (length - 26);
                const py = centerY + Math.sin(t * 12 + phase) * spread * 0.42;
                ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.22 + 0.55 * (1 - t)})`;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, 1.8 + (1 - t) * 0.9, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        function drawFlat(v, m) {
            ctxF.clearRect(0,0,400,280);
            drawBackdrop(ctxF);
            drawJetBeam(ctxF, 34, 150, 188, 18, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.98)', 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.16)', v * 0.35 + m * 0.12);

            ctxF.fillStyle = 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12)';
            ctxF.fillRect(227, 78, 18, 154);
            ctxF.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctxF.fillRect(224, 74, 18, 160);

            for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
                const spread = i * 4;
                ctxF.fillStyle = `rgba(56, 189, 248, ${0.26 + i * 0.035})`;
                ctxF.beginPath();
                ctxF.arc(238 + (i % 3) * 5, 126 - spread, 2.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctxF.arc(238 + ((i + 1) % 3) * 5, 154 + spread, 2.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctxF.fill();
            }

            drawArrow(ctxF, 42, 112, 176, 112, '#2563eb', 'ulaz v₁');
            drawArrow(ctxF, 254, 150, 340, 150, '#ef4444', 'F_R = ṁv₁');

            ctxF.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctxF.font = 'bold 11px Aptos';
            ctxF.fillText('ravna ploča', 214, 68);
            ctxF.fillText('x-komponenta nestaje', 250, 104);
            ctxF.fillText('izlaz se raspodijeli gore i dolje', 246, 122);
            ctxF.fillText('ulazni impuls = ṁv₁', 36, 176);
        }

        function drawCup(v, m) {
            ctxC.clearRect(0,0,400,280);
            drawBackdrop(ctxC);
            drawJetBeam(ctxC, 34, 150, 184, 18, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.98)', 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18)', v * 0.3 + m * 0.1);

            ctxC.strokeStyle = '#334155';
            ctxC.lineWidth = 10;
            ctxC.lineCap = 'round';
            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.moveTo(238, 92);
            ctxC.quadraticCurveTo(286, 140, 238, 188);
            ctxC.stroke();
            ctxC.lineCap = 'butt';

            const returnTop = ctxC.createLinearGradient(224, 104, 112, 94);
            returnTop.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.72)');
            returnTop.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.14)');
            ctxC.fillStyle = returnTop;
            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.moveTo(224, 108);
            ctxC.lineTo(110, 92);
            ctxC.lineTo(110, 108);
            ctxC.lineTo(224, 120);
            ctxC.closePath();
            ctxC.fill();

            const returnBottom = ctxC.createLinearGradient(224, 176, 112, 188);
            returnBottom.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.72)');
            returnBottom.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.14)');
            ctxC.fillStyle = returnBottom;
            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.moveTo(224, 160);
            ctxC.lineTo(110, 172);
            ctxC.lineTo(110, 188);
            ctxC.lineTo(224, 176);
            ctxC.closePath();
            ctxC.fill();

            for (let i = 0; i < 11; i++) {
                const t = i / 10;
                ctxC.fillStyle = `rgba(56, 189, 248, ${0.22 + 0.45 * (1 - t)})`;
                ctxC.beginPath();
                ctxC.arc(206 - t * 92, 104 - t * 13, 2.1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctxC.arc(206 - t * 92, 176 + t * 11, 2.1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctxC.fill();
            }

            drawArrow(ctxC, 42, 112, 176, 112, '#2563eb', 'ulaz v₁');
            drawArrow(ctxC, 254, 150, 352, 150, '#dc2626', 'F_R = 2ṁv₁');

            ctxC.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctxC.font = 'bold 11px Aptos';
            ctxC.fillText('zakrivljena lopatica', 210, 78);
            ctxC.fillText('povratni mlaz -> v_iz,x < 0', 108, 88);
            ctxC.fillText('promjena impulsa se udvostručuje', 226, 104);
            ctxC.fillText('izlaz ide natrag u oba kraka', 112, 206);
        }

        vSl.oninput = mSl.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Zakon količine gibanja primjenjuj kada je glavni cilj odrediti silu ili reakciju iz promjene brzine fluida kroz kontrolni volumen.</li>
            <li>Prije računa uvijek jasno odvoji ulazni i izlazni smjer brzine, jer predznak komponenata izravno određuje smjer rezultantne sile.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Najčešća greška je računati samo promjenu iznosa brzine, a zanemariti da impulsna jednadžba prati promjenu vektora brzine i zato ovisi o smjeru skretanja mlaza.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z97 — Vrijeme pražnjenja spremnika {.unnumbered}

Otvoreni spremnik promjera D napunjen je vodom u početnom trenutku do visine h0. Spremnik se počinje prazniti kroz glatku sapnicu na dnu spremnika, promjera d. Potrebno je odrediti općeniti izraz za potrebno vrijeme da se razina vode u spremniku spusti sa visine h0 na visinu h, također je potrebno odrediti vrijeme potrebno za potpuno pražnjenje spremnika ukoliko je D = 0,5 m, d = 25 mm, h0 = 50 cm. Pretpostaviti da je koeficijent protjecanja Cd = 1.

**Zadano:** $D=0,5\,\text{m}$, $d=25\,\text{mm}$, $h_0=50\,\text{cm}$, $C_d=1$
**Odrediti:** općeniti izraz za vrijeme $T$, vrijeme za potpuno pražnjenje

**Rješenje:**
$T = \left( \frac{D}{d} \right)^2 \frac{2 \sqrt{h_0}}{\sqrt{2g}} = \left( \frac{0,5}{0,025} \right)^2 \frac{2 \sqrt{0,5}}{\sqrt{19,62}} = \mathbf{127,7 \, \text{s}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<style>
    #z99-rotating-widget .z99-grid,
    #bend-widget .bend-grid,
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-grid {
        display: grid !important;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
        gap: 1rem !important;
        align-items: start !important;
    }
    #z99-rotating-widget .z99-scene,
    #bend-widget .bend-scene,
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-scene {
        display: flex !important;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 0.95rem;
        min-height: 0 !important;
        height: auto !important;
        overflow: visible !important;
        padding-bottom: 1rem;
    }
    #z99-rotating-widget canvas,
    #bend-widget canvas,
    #z103-turbine-widget canvas {
        display: block;
        width: 100% !important;
        height: auto !important;
    }
    #z99-rotating-widget .z99-overlay,
    #bend-widget .bend-overlay,
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-overlay {
        position: static !important;
        inset: auto !important;
        left: auto !important;
        right: auto !important;
        top: auto !important;
        bottom: auto !important;
        transform: none !important;
        margin: 0 1rem;
        align-self: flex-start;
    }
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-case {
        position: static !important;
        inset: auto !important;
        left: auto !important;
        right: auto !important;
        top: auto !important;
        bottom: auto !important;
        transform: none !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        align-self: auto;
    }
    #z99-rotating-widget .z99-side,
    #bend-widget .bend-side,
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-side {
        display: grid !important;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 0.95rem !important;
        align-items: start;
    }
    #z99-rotating-widget .z99-side > div,
    #bend-widget .bend-side > div,
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-side > div {
        margin: 0 !important;
    }
    #z99-rotating-widget .z99-explainer,
    #bend-widget .bend-explainer,
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-cases,
    #z103-turbine-widget .z103-explainer {
        grid-column: 1 / -1;
    }
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-side,
        #bend-widget .bend-side,
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-side {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-explainer,
        #bend-widget .bend-explainer,
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-cases,
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-explainer {
            grid-column: auto;
        }
    }
</style>
<!-- WIDGET: Pražnjenje spremnika -->
<div id="z97-drain-widget" style="max-width: 1080px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-shell {
            border-radius: 28px;
            border: 1px solid #caddee;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.12), transparent 26%), linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            padding: 28px;
            box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.1);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.1vw, 1.7rem);
            line-height: 1.1;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            line-height: 1.54;
            max-width: 72ch;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chip {
            padding: 10px 14px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dbeafe, #eff6ff);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            line-height: 1.35;
            max-width: min(100%, 340px);
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: right;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eef7ff, #fff8ef);
            border: 1px solid #d7e6fb;
            border-radius: 18px;
            color: #1d4a77;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            line-height: 1.55;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-grid {
            display: grid;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-stage {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.28fr) minmax(250px, 0.72fr);
            gap: 16px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.82fr) minmax(0, 1.18fr);
            gap: 16px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z97-drain-widget .z97-head {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z97-drain-widget .z97-chip {
                justify-self: start;
                text-align: left;
            }
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-scene {
            position: relative;
            min-height: 0;
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #d7e6f7;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #eef6ff 64%, #e6f1ff 100%);
            padding: 16px 16px 12px;
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.84);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            border-radius: 18px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-overlay,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-tip {
            position: static;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
            border: 1px solid rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.92);
            border-radius: 18px;
            color: #334155;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.08);
            max-width: none;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-overlay {
            padding: 14px 16px;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            line-height: 1.45;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, #f7fbff);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-tip {
            padding: 14px 16px;
            font-size: 0.73rem;
            line-height: 1.42;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eef6ff, #ffffff);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-tip-title {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-progress-card {
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.52);
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f3b7a, #0ea5e9);
            color: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 18px 36px rgba(14, 116, 214, 0.18);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-progress-card small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-progress-card strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2vw, 1.7rem);
            line-height: 1;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-progress-card span {
            display: block;
            margin-top: 0.45rem;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            line-height: 1.45;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-side {
            display: grid;
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-controls,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chart,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-metric,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-explainer,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chain {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-controls,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chart,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-explainer,
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chain {
            padding: 16px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-controls {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 7px;
            font-size: 0.79rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #334155;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-control input {
            width: 100%;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-buttons {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-btn {
            border: none;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 12px 14px;
            font-weight: 800;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-btn-primary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #0ea5e9);
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-btn-secondary {
            background: #eff6ff;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-btn-muted {
            background: #f8fafc;
            color: #475569;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-metric {
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 14px 15px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: clamp(0.94rem, 1.4vw, 1.04rem);
            color: #0f172a;
            overflow-wrap: anywhere;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chart {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chart-title {
            margin: 0 0 10px;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-explainer {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff7ed, #fffaf5);
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-chain {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
            border-color: #dbeafe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-step {
            min-width: 0;
            padding: 12px 10px;
            border-radius: 14px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.88);
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-step small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.64rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-step strong {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z97-drain-widget .z97-step span {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: #475569;
        }
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
            #z97-drain-widget .z97-stage,
            #z97-drain-widget .z97-lower {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 640px) {
            #z97-drain-widget .z97-buttons,
            #z97-drain-widget .z97-metrics,
            #z97-drain-widget .z97-chain {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z97-shell">
        <div class="z97-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z97-kicker">Z97 nestacionarno istjecanje</div>
                <h4 class="z97-title">Jedan spremnik, jedna sapnica, ali brzina pada kako pada i visina stupca</h4>
                <p class="z97-sub">Ovdje više nije dovoljno izračunati jednu brzinu istjecanja. Kako se razina vode spušta, pada i pogonska visina <strong>h</strong>, zato istodobno opadaju i <strong>v = C<sub>d</sub>√(2gh)</strong> i protok <strong>Q</strong>. Zbog toga je i vrijeme pražnjenja rezultat integracije, a ne jedne stacionarne formule.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z97-chip">T = 2A(√h₀ - √h) / (C<sub>d</sub>a√(2g))</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z97-note"><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> trenutna razina određuje trenutnu izlaznu brzinu, brzina određuje protok kroz sapnicu, a protok određuje koliko brzo se razina dalje spušta. Zato je najvažnije pratiti lanac <strong>h -> v -> Q -> dh/dt</strong>, a ne samo početno i završno stanje.</div>

        <div class="z97-grid">
            <div class="z97-stage">
                <div class="z97-scene">
                    <canvas id="z97-canvas" width="660" height="500"></canvas>
                </div>

                <div class="z97-summary">
                    <div class="z97-overlay">
                        <div><strong>Početna visina:</strong> <span id="z97-h0-live">0.50</span> m</div>
                        <div><strong>Trenutna visina:</strong> <span id="z97-h-live">0.50</span> m</div>
                        <div><strong>Vrijeme:</strong> <span id="z97-t-live">0.0</span> s</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z97-tip">
                        <span class="z97-tip-title">Ključna ideja</span>
                        <div>Dok je spremnik puniji, sapnica izbacuje vodu brže. Kako <strong>h</strong> pada, mlaz slabi i zadnji dio pražnjenja postaje sporiji nego što izgleda iz samog početnog toka.</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z97-progress-card">
                        <small>Stupanj pražnjenja</small>
                        <strong id="z97-res-progress">0.0 %</strong>
                        <span>Najvažniji lanac za čitanje scene je <strong>h -&gt; v -&gt; Q -&gt; dh/dt</strong>.</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z97-lower">
                <div class="z97-controls">
                    <div class="z97-control">
                        <label>Promjer spremnika D: <span id="z97-v-D" style="color:#2563eb;">0.50</span> m</label>
                        <input type="range" id="z97-slider-D" min="0.3" max="1.2" step="0.01" value="0.5" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="z97-control">
                        <label>Promjer sapnice d: <span id="z97-v-d" style="color:#0f766e;">25</span> mm</label>
                        <input type="range" id="z97-slider-d" min="10" max="80" step="1" value="25" style="accent-color:#0f766e;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="z97-control">
                        <label>Početna razina h₀: <span id="z97-v-h0" style="color:#ea580c;">0.50</span> m</label>
                        <input type="range" id="z97-slider-h0" min="0.2" max="2.0" step="0.02" value="0.5" style="accent-color:#ea580c;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="z97-control">
                        <label>Koeficijent protjecanja C<sub>d</sub>: <span id="z97-v-cd" style="color:#7c3aed;">1.00</span></label>
                        <input type="range" id="z97-slider-cd" min="0.6" max="1.0" step="0.01" value="1.0" style="accent-color:#7c3aed;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="z97-buttons">
                        <button id="z97-btn-start" class="z97-btn z97-btn-primary">POKRENI</button>
                        <button id="z97-btn-pause" class="z97-btn z97-btn-secondary">PAUZA</button>
                        <button id="z97-btn-reset" class="z97-btn z97-btn-muted">RESET</button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="z97-side">
                    <div class="z97-metrics">
                        <div class="z97-metric"><small>Brzina istjecanja v</small><strong id="z97-res-v">0.00 m/s</strong></div>
                        <div class="z97-metric"><small>Volumenski protok Q</small><strong id="z97-res-q">0.0000 m³/s</strong></div>
                        <div class="z97-metric"><small>Brzina pada dh/dt</small><strong id="z97-res-dhdt">0.0000 m/s</strong></div>
                        <div class="z97-metric"><small>Preostalo vrijeme</small><strong id="z97-res-tleft">0.0 s</strong></div>
                        <div class="z97-metric"><small>Ukupno vrijeme T</small><strong id="z97-res-ttotal">0.0 s</strong></div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="z97-chart">
                        <div class="z97-chart-title">Visina h(t)</div>
                        <canvas id="z97-graph" width="360" height="220"></canvas>
                    </div>

                    <div class="z97-chain">
                        <div class="z97-step"><small>Korak 1</small><strong>h</strong><span>Visina stupca stvara pogonski tlak na sapnici.</span></div>
                        <div class="z97-step"><small>Korak 2</small><strong>v</strong><span>Veća visina daje veću Torricellijevu brzinu istjecanja.</span></div>
                        <div class="z97-step"><small>Korak 3</small><strong>Q</strong><span>Brzina i presjek sapnice određuju trenutni protok.</span></div>
                        <div class="z97-step"><small>Korak 4</small><strong>dh/dt</strong><span>Protok zatim određuje koliko se brzo razina dalje spušta.</span></div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="z97-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z97-explainer">Na početku je pogonska visina najveća pa je i istjecanje najjače. Kako se razina spušta, istjecanje postaje sve sporije, zbog čega krivulja h(t) nije pravac nego sve blaže pada.</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z97-canvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const graphCanvas = document.getElementById('z97-graph');
        const gCtx = graphCanvas.getContext('2d');

        const sliderD = document.getElementById('z97-slider-D');
        const sliderd = document.getElementById('z97-slider-d');
        const sliderH0 = document.getElementById('z97-slider-h0');
        const sliderCd = document.getElementById('z97-slider-cd');
        const btnStart = document.getElementById('z97-btn-start');
        const btnPause = document.getElementById('z97-btn-pause');
        const btnReset = document.getElementById('z97-btn-reset');

        const g = 9.81;
        let running = false;
        let lastFrame = null;
        let state = {
            D: 0.5,
            d: 0.025,
            h0: 0.5,
            cd: 1.0,
            h: 0.5,
            elapsed: 0,
            history: [],
            jetPhase: 0
        };

        function getAreas() {
            return {
                A: Math.PI * state.D * state.D / 4,
                a: Math.PI * state.d * state.d / 4
            };
        }

        function getVelocity(height) {
            return state.cd * Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, 2 * g * height));
        }

        function getFlow(height) {
            const { a } = getAreas();
            return a * getVelocity(height);
        }

        function getHeightRate(height) {
            const { A } = getAreas();
            return -(getFlow(height) / A);
        }

        function getAnalyticTime(fromHeight, toHeight) {
            const { A, a } = getAreas();
            if (state.cd <= 0 || a <= 0) return 0;
            return (2 * A * (Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, fromHeight)) - Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, toHeight)))) / (state.cd * a * Math.sqrt(2 * g));
        }

        function resetState() {
            state.D = parseFloat(sliderD.value);
            state.d = parseFloat(sliderd.value) / 1000;
            state.h0 = parseFloat(sliderH0.value);
            state.cd = parseFloat(sliderCd.value);
            state.h = state.h0;
            state.elapsed = 0;
            state.history = [{ t: 0, h: state.h0 }];
            state.jetPhase = 0;
            running = false;
            lastFrame = null;
            btnStart.textContent = 'POKRENI';
            drawAll();
        }

        function syncStateFromControls() {
            state.D = parseFloat(sliderD.value);
            state.d = parseFloat(sliderd.value) / 1000;
            state.h0 = parseFloat(sliderH0.value);
            state.cd = parseFloat(sliderCd.value);
        }

        function updateMetrics() {
            const v = getVelocity(state.h);
            const q = getFlow(state.h);
            const dhdt = getHeightRate(state.h);
            const totalTime = getAnalyticTime(state.h0, 0);
            const timeLeft = getAnalyticTime(state.h, 0);
            const progress = state.h0 > 0 ? (1 - state.h / state.h0) * 100 : 100;

            document.getElementById('z97-v-D').textContent = state.D.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z97-v-d').textContent = Math.round(state.d * 1000).toString();
            document.getElementById('z97-v-h0').textContent = state.h0.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z97-v-cd').textContent = state.cd.toFixed(2);

            document.getElementById('z97-h0-live').textContent = state.h0.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z97-h-live').textContent = state.h.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z97-t-live').textContent = state.elapsed.toFixed(1);

            document.getElementById('z97-res-v').textContent = v.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
            document.getElementById('z97-res-q').textContent = q.toFixed(4) + ' m³/s';
            document.getElementById('z97-res-dhdt').textContent = dhdt.toFixed(4) + ' m/s';
            document.getElementById('z97-res-tleft').textContent = timeLeft.toFixed(1) + ' s';
            document.getElementById('z97-res-ttotal').textContent = totalTime.toFixed(1) + ' s';
            document.getElementById('z97-res-progress').textContent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, progress)).toFixed(1) + ' %';

            document.getElementById('z97-explainer').textContent = `Trenutna visina stupca je ${state.h.toFixed(2)} m pa sapnica izbacuje vodu brzinom ${v.toFixed(2)} m/s i protokom ${q.toFixed(4)} m³/s. Budući da je dh/dt = ${dhdt.toFixed(4)} m/s, spremnik se sada prazni sporije nego na početku, a do dna je preostalo još oko ${timeLeft.toFixed(1)} s.`;
        }

        function drawScene() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const tankLeft = 120;
            const tankTop = 70;
            const tankWidth = 220;
            const tankHeight = 330;
            const maxHeight = 2.0;
            const waterHeight = Math.min(state.h / maxHeight, 1) * tankHeight;
            const initialHeight = Math.min(state.h0 / maxHeight, 1) * tankHeight;
            const nozzleWidth = 54;
            const nozzleHeight = 18;
            const nozzleX = tankLeft + tankWidth - 6;
            const nozzleY = tankTop + tankHeight - 28;
            const surfaceY = tankTop + tankHeight - waterHeight;

            const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            sky.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
            sky.addColorStop(1, '#eaf4ff');
            ctx.fillStyle = sky;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
            ctx.fillRect(38, tankTop + tankHeight + 28, canvas.width - 76, 10);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.22)';
            ctx.fillRect(tankLeft, tankTop, tankWidth, tankHeight);

            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.5)';
            ctx.setLineDash([8, 6]);
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(tankLeft - 12, tankTop + tankHeight - initialHeight);
            ctx.lineTo(tankLeft + tankWidth + 12, tankTop + tankHeight - initialHeight);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            const waterGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, surfaceY, 0, tankTop + tankHeight);
            waterGradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.88)');
            waterGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(29, 78, 216, 0.98)');
            ctx.fillStyle = waterGradient;
            ctx.fillRect(tankLeft, surfaceY, tankWidth, waterHeight);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.32)';
            ctx.fillRect(tankLeft, surfaceY, tankWidth, 4);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.strokeRect(tankLeft, tankTop, tankWidth, tankHeight);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctx.fillRect(nozzleX, nozzleY, nozzleWidth, nozzleHeight);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(nozzleX, nozzleY, nozzleWidth, nozzleHeight);

            const jetLength = Math.max(24, getVelocity(state.h) * 18);
            const jetSpread = 8 + state.jetPhase * 8;
            const jetGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(nozzleX + nozzleWidth, nozzleY + nozzleHeight / 2, nozzleX + nozzleWidth + jetLength, nozzleY + nozzleHeight / 2 + jetSpread);
            jetGradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.95)');
            jetGradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15)');
            ctx.fillStyle = jetGradient;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(nozzleX + nozzleWidth, nozzleY + 4);
            ctx.lineTo(nozzleX + nozzleWidth + jetLength, nozzleY + nozzleHeight / 2 - jetSpread);
            ctx.lineTo(nozzleX + nozzleWidth + jetLength, nozzleY + nozzleHeight / 2 + jetSpread);
            ctx.lineTo(nozzleX + nozzleWidth, nozzleY + nozzleHeight - 4);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('početna razina h₀', tankLeft + tankWidth + 26, tankTop + tankHeight - initialHeight - 8);
            ctx.fillText('trenutna razina h', tankLeft + tankWidth + 26, surfaceY - 8);
            ctx.fillText('sapnica d', nozzleX + 2, nozzleY - 10);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(tankLeft - 36, tankTop + tankHeight);
            ctx.lineTo(tankLeft - 36, surfaceY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(tankLeft - 42, tankTop + tankHeight);
            ctx.lineTo(tankLeft - 30, tankTop + tankHeight);
            ctx.moveTo(tankLeft - 42, surfaceY);
            ctx.lineTo(tankLeft - 30, surfaceY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('h = ' + state.h.toFixed(2) + ' m', tankLeft - 86, (tankTop + tankHeight + surfaceY) / 2);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(tankLeft + tankWidth + 10, tankTop + tankHeight - initialHeight);
            ctx.lineTo(tankLeft + tankWidth + 112, tankTop + tankHeight - initialHeight);
            ctx.moveTo(tankLeft + tankWidth + 10, surfaceY);
            ctx.lineTo(tankLeft + tankWidth + 112, surfaceY);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.font = '12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('D = ' + state.D.toFixed(2) + ' m', tankLeft + 72, tankTop + tankHeight + 56);
            ctx.fillText('v = ' + getVelocity(state.h).toFixed(2) + ' m/s', nozzleX + 78, nozzleY + 2);
            ctx.fillText('Q = ' + getFlow(state.h).toFixed(4) + ' m³/s', nozzleX + 78, nozzleY + 22);
        }

        function drawGraph() {
            gCtx.clearRect(0, 0, graphCanvas.width, graphCanvas.height);
            const padL = 42;
            const padR = 14;
            const padT = 16;
            const padB = 28;
            const W = graphCanvas.width;
            const H = graphCanvas.height;
            const innerW = W - padL - padR;
            const innerH = H - padT - padB;
            const totalTime = Math.max(getAnalyticTime(state.h0, 0), 1);

            gCtx.strokeStyle = '#e2e8f0';
            gCtx.lineWidth = 1;
            for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
                const y = padT + (innerH * i / 4);
                gCtx.beginPath();
                gCtx.moveTo(padL, y);
                gCtx.lineTo(W - padR, y);
                gCtx.stroke();
            }

            gCtx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            gCtx.lineWidth = 1.5;
            gCtx.beginPath();
            gCtx.moveTo(padL, padT);
            gCtx.lineTo(padL, H - padB);
            gCtx.lineTo(W - padR, H - padB);
            gCtx.stroke();

            gCtx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
            gCtx.lineWidth = 2.5;
            gCtx.beginPath();
            state.history.forEach((point, index) => {
                const x = padL + Math.min(point.t / totalTime, 1) * innerW;
                const y = padT + (1 - point.h / Math.max(state.h0, 0.01)) * innerH;
                if (index === 0) gCtx.moveTo(x, y);
                else gCtx.lineTo(x, y);
            });
            gCtx.stroke();

            const currentX = padL + Math.min(state.elapsed / totalTime, 1) * innerW;
            const currentY = padT + (1 - state.h / Math.max(state.h0, 0.01)) * innerH;
            gCtx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
            gCtx.beginPath();
            gCtx.arc(currentX, currentY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            gCtx.fill();

            gCtx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            gCtx.font = '11px Inter';
            gCtx.fillText('h/h₀', 8, padT + 4);
            gCtx.fillText('t', W - padR - 6, H - 8);
            gCtx.fillText('0', padL - 14, H - padB + 14);
            gCtx.fillText(totalTime.toFixed(0) + ' s', W - padR - 28, H - padB + 14);
        }

        function drawAll() {
            updateMetrics();
            drawScene();
            drawGraph();
        }

        function tick(timestamp) {
            if (!running) return;
            if (lastFrame === null) lastFrame = timestamp;
            const dt = Math.min((timestamp - lastFrame) / 1000, 0.05) * 4;
            lastFrame = timestamp;

            if (state.h > 0) {
                const dhdt = getHeightRate(state.h);
                state.h = Math.max(0, state.h + dhdt * dt);
                state.elapsed += dt;
                state.jetPhase = (state.jetPhase + dt * 2) % 1;
                state.history.push({ t: state.elapsed, h: state.h });
                if (state.history.length > 420) state.history.shift();
            }

            if (state.h <= 0.0005) {
                state.h = 0;
                running = false;
                btnStart.textContent = 'POKRENI';
            }

            drawAll();
            if (running) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
        }

        btnStart.addEventListener('click', function() {
            if (state.h <= 0) {
                resetState();
            }
            running = true;
            lastFrame = null;
            btnStart.textContent = 'AKTIVNO';
            requestAnimationFrame(tick);
        });

        btnPause.addEventListener('click', function() {
            running = false;
            btnStart.textContent = 'NASTAVI';
        });

        btnReset.addEventListener('click', function() {
            resetState();
        });

        [sliderD, sliderd, sliderH0, sliderCd].forEach(function(slider) {
            slider.addEventListener('input', function() {
                syncStateFromControls();
                resetState();
            });
        });

        resetState();
    })();
    </script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z98 — Kinematika dva mlaza {.unnumbered}

Iz velikog spremnika istrujavaju dva mlaza pri čemu je promjer sapnica identičan, prikazano na slici. Na horizontalnoj udaljenosti 10m od spremnika dva mlaza dolaze u doticaj sa horizontalnom plohom u istoj točki. Potrebno je odrediti vrijednosti H i h.

**Zadano:** $L=10\,\text{m}$, dva mlaza na istoj točki
**Odrediti:** $H$, $h$

**Rješenje:**
1. Donji mlaz: $10 = 2\sqrt{(H-4) \cdot 4} \implies H = \mathbf{10,25 \, \text{m}}$.
2. Gornji mlaz: $10 = 2\sqrt{(10,25-4-h) \cdot (4+h)} \implies h = \mathbf{2,25 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Dva mlaza (Parabolični letovi) -->
<div id="z98-jets-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-shell {
            border-radius: 28px;
            border: 1px solid #d5e4f4;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            max-width: 72ch;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-chip {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dbeafe, #eff6ff);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #c9ddff;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-scene {
            border-radius: 22px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #d7e6f7;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #eef6ff 68%, #e6f0fb 100%);
        }
        #z98-jets-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, auto) minmax(0, 1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-target-note {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.55rem;
            padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.93);
            color: #b91c1c;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.08);
            min-height: 54px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-target-dot {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: #ef4444;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.55);
            flex: 0 0 auto;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-badges {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-badge,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-controls,
        #z98-jets-widget #z98-match-card,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-badge {
            padding: 14px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-badge small,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-quick small,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-prod-label,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-status-kicker {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-badge strong,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-quick strong,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-prod-value {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.08rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-controls,
        #z98-jets-widget #z98-match-card,
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-control + .z98-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #334155;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-control input {
            width: 100%;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-quick {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-quick > div {
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #eff6ff;
            padding: 12px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget #z98-match-card {
            background: #f0fdf4;
            border-left: 6px solid #22c55e;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget #z98-match-text {
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 1rem;
            color: #166534;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-match-copy {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            line-height: 1.55;
            color: #15803d;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-prod-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-prod-grid > div {
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.18);
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            padding: 12px;
        }
        #z98-jets-widget .z98-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-head,
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-summary,
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-lower,
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-badges,
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-quick,
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-prod-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z98-jets-widget .z98-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z98-shell">
        <div class="z98-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z98-kicker">Z98 kinematika dva mlaza</div>
                <h3 class="z98-title">Jednak domet ne traži jednake dubine, nego isti produkt <span style="white-space:nowrap;">h(H-h)</span></h3>
                <p class="z98-sub">Ovaj widget sada direktno odvaja geometriju scene od rezultata: prvo vidiš spremnik i ciljnu točku, zatim uspoređuješ domete, a ispod toga čitaš koliko je par otvora blizu idealnoj simetriji oko sredine spremnika.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z98-chip">x = 2√(h(H-h))</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z98-note"><strong>Kako čitati simetriju:</strong> Domet ovisi o produktu <strong>h(H-h)</strong>, a ne o samoj dubini zasebno. Kad su otvori gotovo simetrični oko <strong>H/2</strong>, oba produkta ispadaju gotovo jednaka pa mlazovi završavaju na istoj točki iako izlaze iz različitih visina.</div>

        <div class="z98-stage">
            <div class="z98-scene">
                <canvas id="z98-canvas" width="550" height="450"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z98-summary">
                <div class="z98-target-note"><span class="z98-target-dot"></span><span>Referentna točka na L = 10 m ostaje fiksna meta za oba mlaza</span></div>
                <div class="z98-badges">
                    <div class="z98-badge"><small>Domet gornjeg mlaza</small><strong id="z98-res-x1">10.0 m</strong></div>
                    <div class="z98-badge"><small>Domet donjeg mlaza</small><strong id="z98-res-x2">10.0 m</strong></div>
                    <div class="z98-badge"><small>Razlika dometa</small><strong id="z98-dx">0.00 m</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z98-lower">
            <div class="z98-controls">
                <div class="z98-control">
                    <label>Ukupna visina H: <span id="z98-v-H" style="color:#2563eb;">10.25</span> m</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z98-H-slider" min="8" max="15" step="0.05" value="10.25">
                </div>
                <div class="z98-control">
                    <label>Dubina gornjeg otvora h₁: <span id="z98-v-h1" style="color:#2563eb;">2.25</span> m</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z98-h1-slider" min="1" max="5" step="0.05" value="2.25">
                </div>
                <div class="z98-control">
                    <label>Dubina donjeg otvora h₂: <span id="z98-v-h2" style="color:#2563eb;">6.25</span> m</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z98-h2-slider" min="5.5" max="10" step="0.05" value="6.25">
                </div>

                <div class="z98-quick">
                    <div><small>Sredina spremnika H/2</small><strong id="z98-midplane">5.13 m</strong></div>
                    <div><small>Zbroj dubina h₁+h₂</small><strong id="z98-depth-sum">8.50 m</strong></div>
                    <div><small>Odstupanje od simetrije</small><strong id="z98-sym-gap">1.75 m</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div id="z98-match-card">
                <div class="z98-status-kicker">Status presjeka</div>
                <div id="z98-match-text">MLAZOVI SE POKLAPAJU! ✅</div>
                <div id="z98-match-copy" class="z98-match-copy">Otvori su gotovo simetrični oko sredine spremnika pa zato daju gotovo isti produkt i domet.</div>
                <div class="z98-prod-grid">
                    <div>
                        <span class="z98-prod-label">h₁(H-h₁)</span>
                        <strong id="z98-prod1" class="z98-prod-value">0.00</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <span class="z98-prod-label">h₂(H-h₂)</span>
                        <strong id="z98-prod2" class="z98-prod-value">0.00</strong>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z98-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z98-explainer">Torricellijeva formula za domet je x = 2√(h(H-h)). Zbog simetrije izraza, dubine simetrične oko H/2 daju isti domet.</span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z98-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const hSl = document.getElementById('z98-H-slider'), h1Sl = document.getElementById('z98-h1-slider'), h2Sl = document.getElementById('z98-h2-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<150; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random(), jet: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : 2 });
    const state = { H: 10.25, h1: 2.25, h2: 6.25 };

    function recalculate() {
        const H = parseFloat(hSl.value);
        h1Sl.max = Math.max(parseFloat(h1Sl.min), H - 0.25).toFixed(2);
        h2Sl.max = Math.max(parseFloat(h2Sl.min), H - 0.25).toFixed(2);

        let h1 = Math.min(parseFloat(h1Sl.value), parseFloat(h1Sl.max));
        let h2 = Math.min(parseFloat(h2Sl.value), parseFloat(h2Sl.max));

        if (Math.abs(parseFloat(h1Sl.value) - h1) > 0.001) h1Sl.value = h1.toFixed(2);
        if (Math.abs(parseFloat(h2Sl.value) - h2) > 0.001) h2Sl.value = h2.toFixed(2);

        const prod1 = Math.max(0, h1 * (H - h1));
        const prod2 = Math.max(0, h2 * (H - h2));
        const x1 = 2 * Math.sqrt(prod1);
        const x2 = 2 * Math.sqrt(prod2);
        const symmetryGap = Math.abs((h1 + h2) - H);
        state.H = H;
        state.h1 = h1;
        state.h2 = h2;

        document.getElementById('z98-v-H').innerText = H.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z98-v-h1').innerText = h1.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z98-v-h2').innerText = h2.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z98-res-x1').innerText = x1.toFixed(1) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z98-res-x2').innerText = x2.toFixed(1) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z98-prod1').innerText = prod1.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z98-prod2').innerText = prod2.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z98-dx').innerText = Math.abs(x1 - x2).toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z98-midplane').textContent = (H / 2).toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z98-depth-sum').textContent = (h1 + h2).toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z98-sym-gap').textContent = symmetryGap.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z98-explainer').textContent = `Za H = ${H.toFixed(2)} m prvi otvor daje produkt ${prod1.toFixed(2)}, a drugi ${prod2.toFixed(2)}. Kad su ti produkti jednaki, dometi su isti; zato ovdje mlazovi daju ${x1.toFixed(2)} m i ${x2.toFixed(2)} m.`;

        const isMatch = Math.abs(x1 - x2) < 0.2;
        const matchCard = document.getElementById('z98-match-card');
        const matchText = document.getElementById('z98-match-text');
        const matchCopy = document.getElementById('z98-match-copy');
        if(isMatch) {
            matchCard.style.background = "#f0fdf4"; matchCard.style.borderLeftColor = "#22c55e";
            matchText.innerText = "MLAZOVI SE POKLAPAJU! ✅"; matchText.style.color = "#166534";
            matchCopy.textContent = symmetryGap < 0.15
                ? 'Otvori su gotovo simetrični oko sredine spremnika pa zato daju gotovo isti produkt i domet.'
                : 'I bez savršene simetrije još uvijek možeš postići gotovo jednak domet jer su oba produkta vrlo blizu.';
            matchCopy.style.color = '#15803d';
        } else {
            matchCard.style.background = "#fffbeb"; matchCard.style.borderLeftColor = "#f59e0b";
            matchText.innerText = "MLAZOVI SE RAZILAZE ⚠️"; matchText.style.color = "#92400e";
            matchCopy.textContent = 'Kad zbroj dubina više nije blizu H i produkti se razdvoje, oba mlaza padaju na različita mjesta.';
            matchCopy.style.color = '#92400e';
        }

    }

    function draw() {
        const W = canvas.width;
        const Hc = canvas.height;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, Hc);

        const scale = Math.min(34, 300 / Math.max(state.H, 1));
        const ox = 120;
        const oy = 398;
        const tankWidth = 72;
        const tankHeight = state.H * scale;
        const tankTop = oy - tankHeight;
        const targetX = ox + 10 * scale;
        const midY = oy - (state.H / 2) * scale;

        const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, Hc);
        sky.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        sky.addColorStop(1, '#e8f3ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = sky;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, Hc);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctx.fillRect(28, oy + 8, W - 56, 11);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(24, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(W - 18, oy);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.38)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.8;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(targetX, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, 48);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(targetX, oy, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('L = 10 m', targetX - 26, oy - 12);

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.14)';
        ctx.fillRect(ox - tankWidth, tankTop, tankWidth, tankHeight);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.42)';
        ctx.fillRect(ox - tankWidth, tankTop, tankWidth, tankHeight);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(ox - tankWidth, tankTop, tankWidth, tankHeight);

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.28)';
        ctx.setLineDash([8, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox - tankWidth - 24, midY);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 24, midY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
```
