```{=html}
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.fillText('H/2', ox - tankWidth - 42, midY + 4);

        const drawJet = (h, color) => {
            const head = state.H - h;
            const originY = oy - head * scale;
            const range = 2 * Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, h * head));
            const landingX = ox + range * scale;

            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(ox, originY);
            const v0 = Math.sqrt(2 * 9.81 * h);
            const fallTime = Math.sqrt((2 * head) / 9.81);
            for (let t = 0; t <= fallTime + 0.01; t += fallTime / 36) {
                const px = ox + v0 * t * scale;
                const py = originY + 0.5 * 9.81 * t * t * scale;
                ctx.lineTo(px, py);
            }
            ctx.stroke();

            return { originY, landingX, head };
        };

        const jet1 = drawJet(state.h1, '#3b82f6');
        const jet2 = drawJet(state.h2, '#f59e0b');

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            particle.t = (particle.t + 0.008 + particle.jet * 0.0015) % 1;
            const h = particle.jet === 1 ? state.h1 : state.h2;
            const head = state.H - h;
            const v0 = Math.sqrt(2 * 9.81 * h);
            const fallTime = Math.sqrt((2 * head) / 9.81);
            const t = particle.t * fallTime;
            const px = ox + v0 * t * scale;
            const py = oy - head * scale + 0.5 * 9.81 * t * t * scale;
            if (py <= oy + 1) {
                ctx.fillStyle = particle.jet === 1 ? 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.75)' : 'rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.75)';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        });

        ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(ox, jet1.originY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f59e0b';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(ox, jet2.originY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#10b981';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(jet1.landingX, oy, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(jet2.landingX, oy, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4ed8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox - tankWidth - 28, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox - tankWidth - 28, tankTop);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox - tankWidth - 34, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox - tankWidth - 22, oy);
        ctx.moveTo(ox - tankWidth - 34, tankTop);
        ctx.lineTo(ox - tankWidth - 22, tankTop);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('H', ox - tankWidth - 44, tankTop - 10);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.fillText('h₁', ox + 12, jet1.originY - 6);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f59e0b';
        ctx.fillText('h₂', ox + 12, jet2.originY - 6);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillText('spremnik', ox - tankWidth - 20, tankTop - 22);
        ctx.fillText('ciljna točka', targetX - 30, oy + 28);
    }

    [hSl, h1Sl, h2Sl].forEach(s => s.oninput = recalculate);
    recalculate();
    function anim() { draw(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); }
    anim();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z99 — Rotirajući spremnik s cijevi {.unnumbered}

Spremnik velikih dimenzija na kojeg je priključena cijev, prikazano na slici, rotira oko simetrale konstantnom kutnom brzinom. Ukoliko je fluid idealan, potrebno je odrediti volumenski protok kroz cijev i pretlak u točki A. Zadane vrijednosti iznose H1= 0,8 m, L=2,2 m, d=10 mm, R =1,4 m, r=1m, pm0 = 0,44 bar, ω= 3,7 rad/s, medij koji se nalazi unutar spremnika je voda.

**Zadano:** $H_1=0,8\,\text{m}$, $L=2,2\,\text{m}$, $d=10\,\text{mm}$, $R=1,4\,\text{m}$, $r=1\,\text{m}$, $p_{m0}=0,44\,\text{bar}$, $\omega=3,7\,\text{rad/s}$, voda
**Odrediti:** $\dot{V}$, $p_{mA}$

**Rješenje:**
1. Za zadane podatke dobije se brzina istjecanja $\mathbf{w \approx 3,99 \, \text{m/s}}$.
2. Za sapnicu promjera $d=10 \, \text{mm}$ slijedi protok $\mathbf{\dot{V} \approx 0,313 \, \text{L/s}}$.
3. Pretlak u točki A iznosi približno $\mathbf{p_{mA} \approx 36,2 \, \text{kPa}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Rotirajući spremnik i Bernoulli -->
<div id="z99-rotating-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-shell {
            border-radius: 28px;
            border: 1px solid #d5e4f4;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            max-width: 72ch;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-chip {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dbeafe, #eff6ff);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #c9ddff;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.22fr) minmax(320px, 0.78fr);
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
            #z99-rotating-widget .z99-head,
            #z99-rotating-widget .z99-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z99-rotating-widget .z99-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-scene {
            position: relative;
            min-height: 500px;
            border-radius: 22px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #d7e6f7;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #eef6ff 68%, #e6f0fb 100%);
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 16px;
            left: 16px;
            padding: 11px 13px;
            border-radius: 14px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.96);
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.93);
            color: #334155;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            line-height: 1.5;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.08);
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-side {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-controls,
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-metric,
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-controls,
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-explainer {
            padding: 16px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-controls {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 7px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #334155;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-control input {
            width: 100%;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-metric {
            padding: 14px;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.08rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z99-rotating-widget .z99-explainer {
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z99-shell">
        <div class="z99-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z99-kicker">Z99 rotirajući spremnik</div>
                <h4 class="z99-title">Rotacija gradi radijalni gradijent tlaka, a ostatak raspoložive energije odlazi u istjecanje</h4>
                <p class="z99-sub">Ovdje treba odvojiti dva učinka. Prvi je <strong>centrifugalni porast tlaka</strong> prema stijenci spremnika, pa zato tlak u točki A nije isti kao u osi. Drugi je da taj isti rotacijski član troši dio raspoložive energije, pa za istjecanje kroz cijev ostaje manja korisna visina.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z99-chip">w = √(2g(H_p - H_g - H_ω))</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z99-note"><strong>Kako čitati model:</strong> najprije iz pretlaka na vrhu i geometrije dobivaš tlakovnu glavu <strong>H_p</strong>. Zatim oduzimaš geodetski pad i rotacijsku glavu <strong>H_ω = ω²r²/(2g)</strong>. Ono što preostane pretvara se u brzinu istjecanja kroz sapnicu. Istodobno se u točki A vidi da tlak raste s radijusom jer rotacija pojačava tlak pri stijenci.</div>

        <div class="z99-grid">
            <div class="z99-scene">
                <canvas id="z99-canvas" width="660" height="500"></canvas>
                <div class="z99-overlay">
                    <div><strong>p<sub>mA</sub>:</strong> <span id="z99-pa-val">36.2 kPa</span></div>
                    <div><strong>w:</strong> <span id="z99-overlay-w">3.99 m/s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>Q:</strong> <span id="z99-overlay-q">0.313 L/s</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z99-side">
                <div class="z99-controls">
                    <div class="z99-control">
                        <label>Kutna brzina ω: <span id="z99-v-w" style="color:#2563eb;">3.7</span> rad/s</label>
                        <input type="range" id="z99-w-slider" min="0" max="7" step="0.1" value="3.7" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="z99-control">
                        <label>Pretlak u tjemenu p<sub>m0</sub>: <span id="z99-v-p0" style="color:#0f766e;">44</span> kPa</label>
                        <input type="range" id="z99-p0-slider" min="20" max="70" step="1" value="44" style="accent-color:#0f766e;">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="z99-metrics">
                    <div class="z99-metric"><small>Pretlak u A</small><strong id="z99-res-pa">36.2 kPa</strong></div>
                    <div class="z99-metric"><small>Brzina istjecanja</small><strong id="z99-res-w">3.99 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class="z99-metric"><small>Volumenski protok</small><strong id="z99-res-vdot">0.313 L/s</strong></div>
                    <div class="z99-metric"><small>Tlačna glava H_p</small><strong id="z99-res-hp">4.49 m</strong></div>
                    <div class="z99-metric"><small>Rotacijska glava H_ω</small><strong id="z99-res-homega">0.70 m</strong></div>
                    <div class="z99-metric"><small>Korisna glava</small><strong id="z99-res-huse">0.81 m</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class="z99-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z99-explainer">Kad povećavaš ω, tlak uz stijenu raste jer centrifugalni član jača s r². Ali isti taj član smanjuje dio energije koji još može otići u izlaznu brzinu, pa se ne može promatrati samo tlak u spremniku bez energetske bilance prema sapnici.</span></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z99-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const wS = document.getElementById('z99-w-slider');
    const p0S = document.getElementById('z99-p0-slider');

    const rho = 1000;
    const g = 9.81;
    const dNozzle = 0.01;
    const rA = 1.0;
    const zA = 1.49;
    const hEff = 3.33;
    const particles = Array.from({ length: 18 }, function(_, index) {
        return {
            radius: 26 + (index % 6) * 15,
            offset: (index / 18) * Math.PI * 2,
            flatten: 0.38 + (index % 4) * 0.04
        };
    });

    const state = {
        omega: 3.7,
        pm0: 44,
        wVel: 0,
        q: 0,
        pa: 0,
        pressureHead: 0,
        centrifugalHead: 0,
        usableHead: 0,
        phase: 0
    };

    function recalculate() {
        state.omega = parseFloat(wS.value);
        state.pm0 = parseFloat(p0S.value);

        const pm0Pa = state.pm0 * 1000;
        const areaNozzle = Math.PI * dNozzle * dNozzle / 4;
        state.pressureHead = pm0Pa / (rho * g);
        state.centrifugalHead = state.omega * state.omega * rA * rA / (2 * g);
        state.usableHead = Math.max(0, state.pressureHead - hEff - state.centrifugalHead);
        state.wVel = Math.sqrt(2 * g * state.usableHead);
        state.q = state.wVel * areaNozzle * 1000;
        state.pa = pm0Pa + 0.5 * rho * state.omega * state.omega * rA * rA - rho * g * zA;

        document.getElementById('z99-v-w').textContent = state.omega.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z99-v-p0').textContent = state.pm0.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z99-pa-val').textContent = (state.pa / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z99-overlay-w').textContent = state.wVel.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z99-overlay-q').textContent = state.q.toFixed(3) + ' L/s';
        document.getElementById('z99-res-pa').textContent = (state.pa / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z99-res-w').textContent = state.wVel.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z99-res-vdot').textContent = state.q.toFixed(3) + ' L/s';
        document.getElementById('z99-res-hp').textContent = state.pressureHead.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z99-res-homega').textContent = state.centrifugalHead.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z99-res-huse').textContent = state.usableHead.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z99-explainer').textContent = `Za ω = ${state.omega.toFixed(1)} rad/s rotacijska glava iznosi ${state.centrifugalHead.toFixed(2)} m, dok tlak u vrhu daje ${state.pressureHead.toFixed(2)} m tlačne glave. Nakon oduzimanja geodetskog i rotacijskog doprinosa ostaje ${state.usableHead.toFixed(2)} m korisne glave, pa fluid izlazi brzinom ${state.wVel.toFixed(2)} m/s, dok je u točki A pretlak ${(state.pa / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const tankLeft = 118;
        const tankTop = 92;
        const tankWidth = 250;
        const tankHeight = 210;
        const centerX = tankLeft + tankWidth / 2;
        const centerY = tankTop + tankHeight / 2;
        const curveAmp = Math.min(34, state.omega * state.omega * 1.35);
        const baseSurface = tankTop + 38;
        const pipeX = tankLeft + tankWidth - 4;
        const pipeY = tankTop + 154;

        const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        sky.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        sky.addColorStop(1, '#eaf4ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = sky;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctx.fillRect(46, tankTop + tankHeight + 54, canvas.width - 92, 10);
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.strokeRect(tankLeft, tankTop, tankWidth, tankHeight);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 18;
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
            for(let i=0; i<150; i++) {
                particles.push({
                    t: Math.random(),
                    lane: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 16,
                    dir: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1,
                    travel: 18 + Math.random() * 26,
                    height: 55 + Math.random() * 60,
                    size: 1.2 + Math.random() * 1.5,
                    offset: Math.random() * 5
                });
            }
        ctx.lineTo(pipeX + 72, pipeY);

            function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
                const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
                const head = 10;
                ctx.strokeStyle = color;
                ctx.lineWidth = 3;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
                ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
                ctx.stroke();
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
                ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
                ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
                ctx.closePath();
                ctx.fillStyle = color;
                ctx.fill();
                if (label) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = color;
                    ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
                    ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 - 8);
                }
            }
        ctx.lineTo(pipeX + 72, pipeY + 116);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeX + 162, pipeY + 116);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pipeX, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeX + 72, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeX + 72, pipeY + 116);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeX + 162, pipeY + 116);
        ctx.stroke();

        const pointAX = pipeX + 24;
        const pointAY = pipeY;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(pointAX, pointAY, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        particles.forEach(function(particle) {
            const angle = state.phase * (0.8 + state.omega * 0.14) + particle.offset;
            const px = centerX + Math.cos(angle) * particle.radius;
            const py = centerY + Math.sin(angle) * (particle.radius * particle.flatten);
            if (px > tankLeft + 14 && px < tankLeft + tankWidth - 14 && py > tankTop + 16 && py < tankTop + tankHeight - 14) {
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.92)';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        });

        const jetLength = Math.max(20, state.wVel * 26);
        const jetGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(pipeX + 162, pipeY + 116, pipeX + 162 + jetLength, pipeY + 116);
        jetGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.96)');
        jetGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.08)');
        ctx.strokeStyle = jetGrad;
        ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pipeX + 162, pipeY + 116);
        ctx.lineTo(pipeX + 162 + jetLength, pipeY + 116);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(centerX, tankTop - 2, 26, 0.2, 2.9);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(centerX - 23, tankTop + 4);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX - 10, tankTop - 8);
        ctx.lineTo(centerX - 8, tankTop + 10);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('rotacija oko osi', centerX - 38, tankTop - 34);
        ctx.fillText('parabolična slobodna površina', tankLeft + 12, tankTop - 12);
        ctx.fillText('točka A', pointAX - 18, pointAY - 14);
        ctx.fillText('sapnica', pipeX + 132, pipeY + 103);
        ctx.fillText('p_mA = ' + (state.pa / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kPa', pipeX + 10, pipeY + 32);
        ctx.fillText('w = ' + state.wVel.toFixed(2) + ' m/s', pipeX + 112, pipeY + 100);
        ctx.fillText('Q = ' + state.q.toFixed(3) + ' L/s', pipeX + 112, pipeY + 136);
    }

    function animate() {
        state.phase += 0.02;
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    wS.addEventListener('input', recalculate);
    p0S.addEventListener('input', recalculate);
    recalculate();
    animate();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z100 — -101: Sila na koljeno cijevi {.unnumbered}

Za dvije izvedbe koljena cijevi potrebno je odrediti silu potrebnu da koljeno ostane u nepomičnom položaju, a za prvi slučaj i pretlak na ulazu.

**Zadatak Z100:**
Konvergentno koljeno koristi se za usmjeravanje vode masenog protoka 14 kg/s iz horizontalnog dijela cijevi u dio cijevi otklonjen od horizontale pod kutom 30°. Ispust se vrši u okolinu u kojoj vlada atmosferski tlak. Površina poprečnog presjeka na ulazu u koljeno iznosi 113 cm2, pri čemu površina poprečnog presjeka na izlazu iz koljena iznosi 7 cm2. Geodetska visinska razlika između ulaza i izlaza iznosi 30 cm. Masa koljena i vode može se zanemariti prilikom proračuna. Potrebno je odrediti pretlak u središnjoj točki ulaznog presjeka koljena, te silu potrebnu da bi se koljeno držalo u nepomičnom položaju. Prilikom proračuna korekcijski faktor količine gibanja iznosi βk=1,03.

**Zadano:** $\dot{m}=14\,\text{kg/s}$, $\alpha=30^\circ$, $A_1=113\,\text{cm}^2$, $A_2=7\,\text{cm}^2$, $\Delta z=30\,\text{cm}$, $\beta_k=1,03$
**Odrediti:** $p_{1m}$, $\vec{F}$

**Zadatak Z101:**
Koljeno iz prethodnog zadatka zamijenjeno je koljenom prikazanim na slici koje je otklonjeno od horizontalne osi za kut od 180°. Geodetska visinska razlika između ulaznog i izlaznog središnjeg presjeka koljena iznosi 0,3 m. Potrebno je odrediti silu koja će održavati koljeno u nepomičnom položaju. Korekcijski faktor iznosi βk = 1,03.

**Zadano:** $\alpha=180^\circ$, $\Delta z=0,3\,\text{m}$, $\beta_k=1,03$, ostali podaci iz Z100
**Odrediti:** $\vec{F}$

**Rješenje (100 - 30°):**
1. $v_1 = 1,24 \, \text{m/s}, v_2 = 20 \, \text{m/s}, p_{1m} = 202 \, \text{kPa}$.
2. $F_{Rx} = \beta \dot{m} (v_2 \cos 30^\circ - v_1) - p_{1m} A_1 = \mathbf{-2053 \, \text{N}}$.
3. $F_{Rz} = \beta \dot{m} v_2 \sin 30^\circ = \mathbf{144 \, \text{N}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- Pipe Bend Force Widget -->
<div id="bend-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #bend-widget .bend-shell {
            border-radius: 28px;
            border: 1px solid #d5e4f4;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            max-width: 72ch;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-chip {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fee2e2, #fff7ed);
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #b91c1c;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #c9ddff;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.18fr) minmax(320px, 0.82fr);
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
            #bend-widget .bend-head,
            #bend-widget .bend-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #bend-widget .bend-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-scene {
            position: relative;
            min-height: 430px;
            border-radius: 22px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #d7e6f7;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #eef6ff 68%, #e6f0fb 100%);
        }
        #bend-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 16px;
            left: 16px;
            padding: 11px 13px;
            border-radius: 14px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.96);
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.93);
            color: #334155;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            line-height: 1.5;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.08);
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-side {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-controls,
        #bend-widget .bend-explainer,
        #bend-widget .bend-metric {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-controls,
        #bend-widget .bend-explainer {
            padding: 16px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 7px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #334155;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-control input {
            width: 100%;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-pills {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-pill {
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            border-radius: 999px;
            padding: 10px 12px;
            background: #eff6ff;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            font-weight: 800;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-pill.is-active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #0ea5e9);
            color: #ffffff;
            border-color: transparent;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-metric {
            padding: 14px;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.08rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #bend-widget .bend-explainer {
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
    </style>

    <div class="bend-shell">
        <div class="bend-head">
            <div>
                <div class="bend-kicker">Z100 - Z101 koljeno cijevi</div>
                <h3 class="bend-title">Sila ne dolazi samo iz skretanja mlaza, nego i iz razlike između impulsa i tlačnog potiska na ulazu</h3>
                <p class="bend-sub">Ovdje nije dovoljno gledati samo da fluid "skreće". U x-smjeru radi i <strong>ulazni tlak p<sub>1m</sub>A<sub>1</sub></strong>, a u z-smjeru postoji samo doprinos promjene impulsa. Zato treba razdvojiti <strong>Δv</strong>, tlačni član i konačne komponente reakcije.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bend-chip">F_Rx = βṁ(v₂cosα - v₁) - p₁A₁</div>
        </div>

        <div class="bend-note"><strong>Kako čitati koljeno:</strong> prvo iz kuta određuješ izlazne komponente brzine, zatim dobivaš promjene <strong>Δv<sub>x</sub></strong> i <strong>Δv<sub>z</sub></strong>, a tek onda vidiš koliko reakcije dolazi iz čistog skretanja mlaza i koliko iz stalnog tlačnog potiska na ulazu. Zato je x-komponenta dominantna i kod manjih kutova.</div>

        <div class="bend-grid">
            <div class="bend-scene">
                <canvas id="bend-canvas" width="640" height="430"></canvas>
                <div class="bend-overlay">
                    <div><strong>α:</strong> <span id="alpha-bend-val">30</span>°</div>
                    <div><strong>F<sub>Rx</sub>:</strong> <span id="bend-overlay-fx">-2053 N</span></div>
                    <div><strong>F<sub>Rz</sub>:</strong> <span id="bend-overlay-fz">144 N</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="bend-side">
                <div class="bend-controls">
                    <div class="bend-control">
                        <label>Kut skretanja α: <span id="bend-angle-live" style="color:#2563eb;">30</span>°</label>
                        <input type="range" id="alpha-bend-slider" min="0" max="180" step="5" value="30" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="bend-pills">
                        <button id="bend-btn-30" class="bend-pill is-active">Z100: 30°</button>
                        <button id="bend-btn-180" class="bend-pill">Z101: 180°</button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="bend-metrics">
                    <div class="bend-metric"><small>Δv_x</small><strong id="bend-dvx">16.08 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class="bend-metric"><small>Δv_z</small><strong id="bend-dvz">10.00 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class="bend-metric"><small>p₁A₁</small><strong id="bend-pressure">2283 N</strong></div>
                    <div class="bend-metric"><small>F_Rx</small><strong id="bend-frx">-2053 N</strong></div>
                    <div class="bend-metric"><small>F_Rz</small><strong id="bend-frz">144 N</strong></div>
                    <div class="bend-metric"><small>|F_R|</small><strong id="bend-frmag">2058 N</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class="bend-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="bend-explainer">Za 30° vertikalna komponenta postoji jer mlaz dobiva uzlazni dio brzine, ali x-komponentu i dalje najviše određuje razlika između impulsnog člana i velikog tlačnog potiska na ulazu. Kad se približiš 180°, vertikalni dio nestaje, a najveći dio sile ostaje u osi cijevi.</span></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const slider = document.getElementById('alpha-bend-slider');
    const btn30 = document.getElementById('bend-btn-30');
    const btn180 = document.getElementById('bend-btn-180');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('bend-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    const beta = 1.03;
    const mDot = 14;
    const v1 = 1.24;
    const v2 = 20;
    const p1m = 202000;
    const A1 = 113e-4;
    const pressureForce = p1m * A1;

    const state = { alpha: 30, frx: 0, frz: 0, magnitude: 0, deltaVx: 0, deltaVz: 0 };

    function setActiveButton(alpha) {
        btn30.classList.toggle('is-active', Math.abs(alpha - 30) < 0.1);
        btn180.classList.toggle('is-active', Math.abs(alpha - 180) < 0.1);
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        const head = 11;
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 - 8);
        }
    }

    function update() {
        state.alpha = parseFloat(slider.value);
        const alphaRad = state.alpha * Math.PI / 180;
        state.deltaVx = v2 * Math.cos(alphaRad) - v1;
        state.deltaVz = v2 * Math.sin(alphaRad);
        state.frx = beta * mDot * state.deltaVx - pressureForce;
        state.frz = beta * mDot * state.deltaVz;
        state.magnitude = Math.sqrt(state.frx * state.frx + state.frz * state.frz);

        document.getElementById('alpha-bend-val').textContent = state.alpha.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('bend-angle-live').textContent = state.alpha.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('bend-overlay-fx').textContent = state.frx.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('bend-overlay-fz').textContent = state.frz.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('bend-dvx').textContent = state.deltaVx.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('bend-dvz').textContent = state.deltaVz.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('bend-pressure').textContent = pressureForce.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('bend-frx').textContent = state.frx.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('bend-frz').textContent = state.frz.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('bend-frmag').textContent = state.magnitude.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('bend-explainer').textContent = `Za kut ${state.alpha.toFixed(0)}° izlazna brzina daje Δv_x = ${state.deltaVx.toFixed(2)} m/s i Δv_z = ${state.deltaVz.toFixed(2)} m/s. Impulsni član u x-smjeru iznosi ${(beta * mDot * state.deltaVx).toFixed(0)} N, ali ga ulazni tlačni potisak ${pressureForce.toFixed(0)} N snažno korigira, pa konačno dobivaš F_Rx = ${state.frx.toFixed(0)} N i F_Rz = ${state.frz.toFixed(0)} N.`;
        setActiveButton(state.alpha);
        draw();
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        sky.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        sky.addColorStop(1, '#eef6ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = sky;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const jointX = 230;
        const jointY = 250;
        const inletStartX = 48;
        const lengthOut = 170;
        const alphaRad = state.alpha * Math.PI / 180;
        const outX = jointX + lengthOut * Math.cos(alphaRad);
        const outY = jointY - lengthOut * Math.sin(alphaRad);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 28;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(inletStartX, jointY);
        ctx.lineTo(jointX, jointY);
        ctx.lineTo(outX, outY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(inletStartX, jointY);
        ctx.lineTo(jointX, jointY);
        ctx.lineTo(outX, outY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(inletStartX, jointY - 9);
        ctx.lineTo(jointX, jointY - 9);
        ctx.lineTo(outX, outY - 9 * Math.cos(alphaRad));
        ctx.lineTo(outX, outY + 9 * Math.cos(alphaRad));
        ctx.lineTo(jointX, jointY + 9);
        ctx.lineTo(inletStartX, jointY + 9);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(70, jointY + 85);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width - 40, jointY + 85);
        ctx.moveTo(jointX - 110, canvas.height - 36);
        ctx.lineTo(jointX - 110, 36);
        ctx.stroke();

        drawArrow(92, jointY, 170, jointY, '#2563eb', 4, 'v1');
        drawArrow(jointX + 16 * Math.cos(alphaRad), jointY - 16 * Math.sin(alphaRad), jointX + 86 * Math.cos(alphaRad), jointY - 86 * Math.sin(alphaRad), '#0f766e', 4, 'v2');
        drawArrow(112, jointY + 42, 188, jointY + 42, '#7c3aed', 4, 'p1A1');

        const forceScale = 0.06;
        const fxEnd = jointX + state.frx * forceScale;
        const fyEnd = jointY - state.frz * forceScale;
        drawArrow(jointX, jointY, fxEnd, fyEnd, '#ef4444', 5, 'FR');

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(jointX, jointY);
        ctx.lineTo(fxEnd, jointY);
        ctx.lineTo(fxEnd, fyEnd);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(jointX, jointY, 42, 0, -alphaRad, alphaRad < 0 ? true : false);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#f59e0b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('α = ' + state.alpha.toFixed(0) + '°', jointX + 30, jointY - 14);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('ulaz', 84, jointY - 28);
        ctx.fillText('izlaz', outX + 12, outY - 6);
        ctx.fillText('Δv_x = ' + state.deltaVx.toFixed(2) + ' m/s', 342, 80);
        ctx.fillText('Δv_z = ' + state.deltaVz.toFixed(2) + ' m/s', 342, 102);
        ctx.fillText('|FR| = ' + state.magnitude.toFixed(0) + ' N', 342, 124);
        ctx.fillText('reakcija iz momenta + tlaka', 320, 154);
    }

    slider.addEventListener('input', update);
    btn30.addEventListener('click', function() {
        slider.value = '30';
        update();
    });
    btn180.addEventListener('click', function() {
        slider.value = '180';
        update();
    });

    update();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z102 — Mlaz na ploču {.unnumbered}

Voda istrujava iz mlaznice srednjom brzinom 20 m/s, pri čemu udara u stacionarnu vertikalno položenu ploču, maseni protok vode iznosi 10 kg/s. Nakon udara, mlaz vode se raspršuje jednoliko u svim smjerovima duž ravnine ploče. Potrebno je odrediti silu potrebnu da ploča ostane u početnom položaju.

**Zadano:** $v=20\,\text{m/s}$, $\dot{m}=10\,\text{kg/s}$, voda
**Odrediti:** $F_R$

**Rješenje:**
$F_R = \dot{m} v_1 = 10 \cdot 20 = \mathbf{200 \, \text{N}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Mlaz na ploču (Impuls) -->
<div id="z102-jetplate-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-shell {
            border-radius: 28px;
            border: 1px solid #d5e4f4;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            max-width: 72ch;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-chip {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fee2e2, #fff1f2);
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #b91c1c;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #c9ddff;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-scene {
            border-radius: 22px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #d7e6f7;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #eef6ff 68%, #e6f0fb 100%);
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, auto) minmax(0, 1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget #z102-force-tag {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 54px;
            padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: #ef4444;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-badges {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-badge,
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-controls,
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-impulse,
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-badge {
            padding: 14px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-badge small,
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-impulse small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-badge strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.08rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-controls,
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-impulse,
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-control + .z102-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #334155;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-control input {
            width: 100%;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-quick {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-quick > div {
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #eff6ff;
            padding: 12px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            color: #1e3a8a;
            line-height: 1.45;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-impulse {
            background: #fef2f2;
            border-left: 6px solid #ef4444;
            color: #991b1b;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-impulse div {
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            color: #b91c1c;
        }
        #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-head,
            #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-summary,
            #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-badges,
            #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-lower,
            #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-quick {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z102-jetplate-widget .z102-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z102-shell">
        <div class="z102-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z102-kicker">Z102 mlaz na ploču</div>
                <h3 class="z102-title">Reakcija ploče nastaje jer nakon udara nestaje cijela x-komponenta brzine</h3>
                <p class="z102-sub">Ovdje je bitno da se scena i impulsna jednadžba čitaju zajedno: ulazni mlaz nosi sav x-impuls, a iza ploče ga razdvajaš gore i dolje, pa izlaz više ne doprinosi u x-smjeru. Zato sila raste linearno s <strong>ṁv₁</strong>.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z102-chip">F<sub>R</sub> = ṁv₁</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z102-note"><strong>Kako čitati udar:</strong> U ovom slučaju mlaz nakon udara više nema x-komponentu brzine. Zato je sila na ploču izravno povezana s time koliko ulaznog impulsa po sekundi dovodiš prema ploči, odnosno s veličinom <strong>ṁv₁</strong>.</div>

        <div class="z102-stage">
            <div class="z102-scene">
                <canvas id="z102-canvas" width="550" height="400"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z102-summary">
                <div id="z102-force-tag">F_R = <span id="z102-res-fr">200</span> N</div>
                <div class="z102-badges">
                    <div class="z102-badge"><small>Ulazni impuls ṁv₁</small><strong id="z102-mdotv">200 N</strong></div>
                    <div class="z102-badge"><small>Izlazna x-komponenta</small><strong id="z102-voutx">0.0 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class="z102-badge"><small>Promjena impulsa</small><strong id="z102-dmom">-200 N</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z102-lower">
            <div class="z102-controls">
                <div class="z102-control">
                    <label>Brzina mlaza v₁: <span id="z102-v-v1" style="color:#2563eb;">20</span> m/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z102-v1-slider" min="5" max="40" step="1" value="20">
                </div>
                <div class="z102-control">
                    <label>Maseni protok ṁ: <span id="z102-v-mdot" style="color:#2563eb;">10</span> kg/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z102-mdot-slider" min="2" max="25" step="0.5" value="10">
                </div>

                <div class="z102-quick">
                    <div><strong>Prije udara:</strong> cijeli impuls je usmjeren prema ploči duž x-osi.</div>
                    <div><strong>Nakon udara:</strong> mlaz odlazi gore i dolje pa za x-smjer vrijedi <strong>v₂,x = 0</strong>.</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z102-impulse">
                <small>Analiza impulsa</small>
                <div>Ulazni impuls: ṁv₁<br>Izlazni impuls (x): 0<br><strong>ΣF_x = ṁ(0 - v₁) = -F_R</strong></div>
            </div>

            <div class="z102-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z102-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z102-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const v1S = document.getElementById('z102-v1-slider'), mS = document.getElementById('z102-mdot-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
        particles.push({
            t: Math.random(),
            lane: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 16,
            dir: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1,
            travel: 18 + Math.random() * 26,
            height: 55 + Math.random() * 60,
            size: 1.2 + Math.random() * 1.5,
            offset: Math.random() * 5
        });
    }
    const state = { v1: 20, fr: 200 };

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        const head = 10;
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2 - 8);
        }
    }

    function recalculate() {
        const v1 = parseFloat(v1S.value), mdot = parseFloat(mS.value);
        const fr = mdot * v1;
        state.v1 = v1;
        state.fr = fr;

        document.getElementById('z102-v-v1').innerText = v1;
        document.getElementById('z102-v-mdot').innerText = mdot;
        document.getElementById('z102-res-fr').innerText = Math.round(fr);
        document.getElementById('z102-mdotv').textContent = fr.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z102-voutx').textContent = '0.0 m/s';
        document.getElementById('z102-dmom').textContent = (-fr).toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z102-explainer').textContent = `Maseni protok ${mdot.toFixed(1)} kg/s pri brzini ${v1.toFixed(1)} m/s dovodi prema ploči ${fr.toFixed(0)} N x-impulsa u sekundi. Nakon udara je v₂,x = 0, pa je promjena količine gibanja ${(-fr).toFixed(0)} N i ploča mora pružiti jednaku reakciju suprotnog smjera.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 400);
        const cy = 200, ox = 56, plateX = 404;

        const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        sky.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        sky.addColorStop(1, '#e8f3ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = sky;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(30, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width - 24, cy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillRect(ox, cy - 24, 42, 48);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.fillRect(ox + 42, cy - 12, 18, 24);

        const beam = ctx.createLinearGradient(ox + 60, cy, plateX, cy);
        beam.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.75)');
        beam.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18)');
        ctx.fillStyle = beam;
        ctx.fillRect(ox + 60, cy - 14, plateX - (ox + 60), 28);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.fillRect(plateX, cy - 105, 16, 210);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.fillRect(plateX + 16, cy - 120, 18, 240);

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            particle.t += 0.004 + (state.v1 / 40) * 0.01;
            if (particle.t > 1) particle.t -= 1;

            if (particle.t < 0.72) {
                const pt = particle.t / 0.72;
                const px = ox + 60 + pt * (plateX - (ox + 60));
                const py = cy + particle.lane;
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.82)';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, particle.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            } else {
                const pt = (particle.t - 0.72) / 0.28;
                const px = plateX + 3 + particle.offset + pt * particle.travel;
                const py = cy + particle.dir * pt * particle.height;
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.55)';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, particle.size * 0.9, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        });

        drawArrow(120, cy - 30, 202, cy - 30, '#2563eb', 'v1');
        drawArrow(plateX + 28, cy - 6, plateX + 28, cy - 70, '#0f766e', 'v2');
        drawArrow(plateX + 28, cy + 6, plateX + 28, cy + 70, '#0f766e', '');

        const arrowLen = Math.min(state.fr / 2.2, 125);
        drawArrow(plateX + 28, cy + 36, plateX + 28 + arrowLen, cy + 36, '#ef4444', 'FR');

        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('mlaz', ox + 6, cy - 34);
        ctx.fillText('ploča', plateX - 4, cy - 118);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.fillText('v₂,x = 0', plateX + 42, cy - 82);
        ctx.fillText('ulazni impuls = ṁv₁', 84, cy + 44);
    }

    function animate() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    v1S.oninput = recalculate;
    mS.oninput = recalculate;
    recalculate();
    animate();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z103 — Vjetroturbina {.unnumbered}

Vjetroturbina promjera 10m generira snagu od 0,4 kW pri brzini nastrujavanja vjetra na vjetroturbinu od 3,13 m/s. Potrebno je odrediti učinkovitost vjetroturbine i horizontalnu silu vjetra na potporni stup vjetroturbine za dotičnu i dvostruko veću brzinu vjetra. Pretpostaviti jednak stupanj učinkovitosti u oba slučaja. Gustoća zraka iznosi 1,2 kg/m3, pretpostaviti da je zrak idealan fluid.

**Zadano:** $D=10\,\text{m}$, $P=0,4\,\text{kW}$, $v_1=3,13\,\text{m/s}$, $\rho=1,2\,\text{kg/m}^3$
**Odrediti:** $\eta$, $F_S$ (za $v_1$ i $2v_1$)

**Rješenje:**
1. Raspoloživa snaga vjetra kroz rotor iznosi $P_v = \frac{1}{2} \rho A v_1^3 \approx 48,1 \, \text{kW}$ pa je korisnost turbine $\eta = \frac{P}{P_v} = \mathbf{0,83 \%}$.
2. U pojednostavljenom energetskom modelu $P = \frac{1}{2}\dot{m}(v_1^2 - v_2^2)$ slijedi $\mathbf{v_2 \approx 9,96 \, \text{m/s}}$.
3. Za $\dot{m} = \rho A v_1$ aksijalna sila na stup iznosi $\mathbf{F_S \approx 40 \, \text{N}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Vjetroturbina i Betzov Limit -->
<div id="z103-turbine-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-shell {
            border-radius: 28px;
            border: 1px solid #d5e4f4;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            max-width: 72ch;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-chip {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dcfce7, #f0fdf4);
            border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
            color: #166534;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #c9ddff;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.16fr) minmax(320px, 0.84fr);
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
            #z103-turbine-widget .z103-head,
            #z103-turbine-widget .z103-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z103-turbine-widget .z103-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-scene {
            position: relative;
            min-height: 470px;
            border-radius: 22px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #d7e6f7;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #eef6ff 68%, #e6f0fb 100%);
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            top: 16px;
            left: 16px;
            padding: 11px 13px;
            border-radius: 14px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.96);
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.93);
            color: #334155;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            line-height: 1.5;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.08);
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-side {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-controls,
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-explainer,
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-metric,
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-case {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-controls,
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-explainer {
            padding: 16px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 7px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #334155;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-control input {
            width: 100%;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-toggle {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-toggle button {
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            border-radius: 999px;
            padding: 10px 12px;
            background: #eff6ff;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            font-weight: 800;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-toggle button.is-active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f766e, #10b981);
            color: #ffffff;
            border-color: transparent;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-metric {
            padding: 14px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.68rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.08rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-cases {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-case {
            padding: 14px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-case h5 {
            margin: 0 0 10px;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-case div {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 10px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: #334155;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }
        #z103-turbine-widget .z103-explainer {
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z103-shell">
        <div class="z103-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z103-kicker">Z103 vjetroturbina</div>
                <h4 class="z103-title">Najprije iz brzine dobiješ raspoloživu snagu, zatim iz korisnosti usporenje struje, a tek onda silu na stup</h4>
                <p class="z103-sub">Pedagoška jezgra zadatka nije samo "koliko vata" daje turbina, nego lanac <strong>v₁ -> P<sub>v</sub> -> P = ηP<sub>v</sub> -> v₂ -> F<sub>S</sub></strong>. Zato ovdje možeš izravno usporediti osnovni režim i slučaj s dvostruko većom brzinom, uz istu korisnost.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z103-chip">P = 1/2 ṁ(v₁² - v₂²)</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z103-note"><strong>Kako čitati turbinu:</strong> raspoloživa snaga raste s <strong>v³</strong>, dok maseni protok raste s <strong>v</strong>. Zato udvostručenje brzine vjetra ne mijenja samo malo rezultat, nego radikalno povećava i dostupnu energiju i aksijalnu silu na stupu. Usporedba oba režima je zato važnija od same jedne brojke.</div>

        <div class="z103-grid">
            <div class="z103-scene">
                <canvas id="z103-canvas" width="660" height="470"></canvas>
                <div class="z103-overlay">
                    <div><strong>Aktivni slučaj:</strong> <span id="z103-active-case">v₁</span></div>
                    <div><strong>v₂:</strong> <span id="z103-res-v2">9.96 m/s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>F<sub>S</sub>:</strong> <span id="z103-res-fs">40 N</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z103-side">
                <div class="z103-controls">
                    <div class="z103-control">
                        <label>Ulazna brzina v₁: <span id="z103-v-v1" style="color:#2563eb;">10.0</span> m/s</label>
                        <input type="range" id="z103-v1-slider" min="4" max="16" step="0.5" value="10" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="z103-control">
                        <label>Korisnost η: <span id="z103-v-eta" style="color:#0f766e;">0.8</span>%</label>
                        <input type="range" id="z103-eta-slider" min="0.1" max="59.3" step="0.1" value="0.8" style="accent-color:#0f766e;">
                    </div>
                    <div class="z103-toggle">
                        <button id="z103-btn-base" class="is-active">Prikaži v₁</button>
                        <button id="z103-btn-double">Prikaži 2v₁</button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="z103-metrics">
                    <div class="z103-metric"><small>P_v</small><strong id="z103-pavail">0 W</strong></div>
                    <div class="z103-metric"><small>P = ηP_v</small><strong id="z103-pextract">0 W</strong></div>
                    <div class="z103-metric"><small>ṁ</small><strong id="z103-mdot">0 kg/s</strong></div>
                    <div class="z103-metric"><small>v₂</small><strong id="z103-v2-metric">0 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class="z103-metric"><small>Sila na stup</small><strong id="z103-fs-metric">0 N</strong></div>
                    <div class="z103-metric"><small>Betz udio</small><strong id="z103-betz">0.0 %</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class="z103-cases">
                    <div class="z103-case">
                        <h5>Slučaj v₁</h5>
                        <div><span>Brzina</span><strong id="z103-case-base-v">10.0 m/s</strong></div>
                        <div><span>Snaga</span><strong id="z103-case-base-p">400 W</strong></div>
                        <div><span>Sila</span><strong id="z103-case-base-f">40 N</strong></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z103-case">
                        <h5>Slučaj 2v₁</h5>
                        <div><span>Brzina</span><strong id="z103-case-double-v">20.0 m/s</strong></div>
                        <div><span>Snaga</span><strong id="z103-case-double-p">3200 W</strong></div>
                        <div><span>Sila</span><strong id="z103-case-double-f">319 N</strong></div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="z103-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z103-explainer">Ako zadržiš istu korisnost, veća brzina vjetra znači mnogo veću raspoloživu snagu i veći maseni protok kroz rotor. Zato i sila na stup raste izrazito brzo, a ne linearno s brzinom.</span></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z103-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const v1S = document.getElementById('z103-v1-slider');
    const etaS = document.getElementById('z103-eta-slider');
    const btnBase = document.getElementById('z103-btn-base');
    const btnDouble = document.getElementById('z103-btn-double');

    const rho = 1.225;
    const D = 10;
    const A = Math.PI * D * D / 4;
    const particles = Array.from({ length: 42 }, function(_, index) {
        return {
            x: (index / 42) * 660,
            yRel: (index % 14) / 7 - 1,
            offset: index * 0.17
        };
    });

    const state = {
        baseV: 10,
        eta: 0.008,
        mode: 'base',
        baseCase: null,
        doubleCase: null,
        spin: 0
    };

    function evaluate(speed) {
        const pAvail = 0.5 * rho * A * speed * speed * speed;
        const power = state.eta * pAvail;
        const v2 = speed * Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, 1 - state.eta));
        const mdot = rho * A * speed;
        const fs = mdot * (speed - v2);
        return { speed: speed, pAvail: pAvail, power: power, v2: v2, mdot: mdot, fs: fs };
    }

    function getActiveCase() {
        return state.mode === 'double' ? state.doubleCase : state.baseCase;
    }

    function setActiveButtons() {
        btnBase.classList.toggle('is-active', state.mode === 'base');
        btnDouble.classList.toggle('is-active', state.mode === 'double');
    }

    function formatPower(value) {
        return value >= 1000 ? (value / 1000).toFixed(2) + ' kW' : Math.round(value) + ' W';
    }

    function recalculate() {
        state.baseV = parseFloat(v1S.value);
        state.eta = parseFloat(etaS.value) / 100;
        state.baseCase = evaluate(state.baseV);
        state.doubleCase = evaluate(state.baseV * 2);

        const active = getActiveCase();
        document.getElementById('z103-v-v1').textContent = state.baseV.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z103-v-eta').textContent = (state.eta * 100).toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z103-active-case').textContent = state.mode === 'double' ? '2v₁' : 'v₁';
        document.getElementById('z103-res-v2').textContent = active.v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z103-res-fs').textContent = Math.round(active.fs) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z103-pavail').textContent = formatPower(active.pAvail);
        document.getElementById('z103-pextract').textContent = formatPower(active.power);
        document.getElementById('z103-mdot').textContent = active.mdot.toFixed(1) + ' kg/s';
        document.getElementById('z103-v2-metric').textContent = active.v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z103-fs-metric').textContent = Math.round(active.fs) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z103-betz').textContent = ((state.eta / 0.593) * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
        document.getElementById('z103-case-base-v').textContent = state.baseCase.speed.toFixed(1) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z103-case-base-p').textContent = formatPower(state.baseCase.power);
        document.getElementById('z103-case-base-f').textContent = Math.round(state.baseCase.fs) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('z103-case-double-v').textContent = state.doubleCase.speed.toFixed(1) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z103-case-double-p').textContent = formatPower(state.doubleCase.power);
        document.getElementById('z103-case-double-f').textContent = Math.round(state.doubleCase.fs) + ' N';

        document.getElementById('z103-explainer').textContent = `Za aktivni slučaj brzina je ${active.speed.toFixed(1)} m/s, kroz rotor prolazi ${active.mdot.toFixed(1)} kg/s zraka, raspoloživa snaga iznosi ${formatPower(active.pAvail)}, a turbina pri korisnosti ${(state.eta * 100).toFixed(1)}% uzima ${formatPower(active.power)}. To usporava tok na ${active.v2.toFixed(2)} m/s i daje silu oko ${Math.round(active.fs)} N na stup.`;
        setActiveButtons();
    }

    function draw() {
        const active = getActiveCase();
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        sky.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        sky.addColorStop(1, '#eaf4ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = sky;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 372, canvas.width, 98);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#bfdbfe';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 386, canvas.width, 84);

        const ox = 292;
        const oy = 192;
        const w1 = 62;
        const w2 = w1 + state.eta * 145;

        ctx.setLineDash([8, 6]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, oy - w1);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(120, oy - w1, 220, oy - w1, ox, oy - w1);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(ox + 110, oy - w1, ox + 130, oy - w2, canvas.width, oy - w2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, oy + w1);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(120, oy + w1, 220, oy + w1, ox, oy + w1);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(ox + 110, oy + w1, ox + 130, oy + w2, canvas.width, oy + w2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        particles.forEach(function(particle) {
            particle.x += (particle.x < ox ? active.speed : active.v2) * 0.42;
            if (particle.x > canvas.width + 12) particle.x = -12;
            const localWidth = particle.x < ox ? w1 : w1 + ((particle.x - ox) / (canvas.width - ox)) * (w2 - w1);
            const py = oy + particle.yRel * localWidth + Math.sin(state.spin + particle.offset) * 2.4;
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.85)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(particle.x, py, 2.4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 14;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, oy + 92);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, 470);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.lineWidth = 5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, oy - 88);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, oy + 88);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3.5;
        for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
            const angle = state.spin * 0.7 * active.speed + i * (Math.PI * 2 / 3);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(ox, oy);
            ctx.lineTo(ox + Math.sin(angle) * 12, oy + Math.cos(angle) * 72);
            ctx.stroke();
        }

        const forceLength = Math.min(150, active.fs / 2.5);
        const jetGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(ox + 24, oy, ox + 24 + forceLength, oy);
        jetGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.95)');
        jetGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15)');
        ctx.strokeStyle = jetGrad;
        ctx.lineWidth = 7;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox + 24, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 24 + forceLength, oy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox + 24 + forceLength, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 10 + forceLength, oy - 9);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 10 + forceLength, oy + 9);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('aktivni slučaj: ' + (state.mode === 'double' ? '2v1' : 'v1'), 38, 42);
        ctx.fillText('v1 = ' + active.speed.toFixed(1) + ' m/s', 46, oy - w1 - 18);
        ctx.fillText('v2 = ' + active.v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s', 520, oy - w2 - 18);
        ctx.fillText('disk turbine', ox - 34, oy - 100);
        ctx.fillText('F_S = ' + Math.round(active.fs) + ' N', ox + 40, oy - 16);
        ctx.fillText('P = ' + formatPower(active.power), 38, 70);
        ctx.fillText('P_v = ' + formatPower(active.pAvail), 38, 92);
    }

    function animate() {
        state.spin += 0.03;
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    v1S.addEventListener('input', recalculate);
    etaS.addEventListener('input', recalculate);
    btnBase.addEventListener('click', function() {
        state.mode = 'base';
        recalculate();
    });
    btnDouble.addEventListener('click', function() {
        state.mode = 'double';
        recalculate();
    });

    recalculate();
    animate();
})();
</script>
```
